LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RUBEN GRIEGO'S UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR COORDINATION FOR PURPOSES OF HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S PETITION AND DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RUBEN GRIEGO'S NOTICE OF HEARING FOR AN ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM LATE CLAIM UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE, SECTION 945.45. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM LATE FILING OF CLAIM IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO MEET ALL REQUIREMENTS FOR RELIEF UNDER GOV'T CODE SECTION 946.6(C). DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Unopposed Petition For Coordination For Purposes Of Hearing On Plaintiff'S Petition And Defendant'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER RUBEN GRIEGO'S UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR COORDINATION FOR PURPOSES OF HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S PETITION AND DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: David L. Plotsky, Esq. of Plotsky and Dougherty, PC 505/268-0095 for petitioner & moving party; Kristina L. Gagne, Esq. of Daley & Heft, LLP 858/755-5666 for deft (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Hearing For An Prder Relieving Petitioner From Late Claim
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER RUBEN GRIEGO'S NOTICE OF HEARING FOR AN ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM LATE CLAIM UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE, SECTION 945.45.

APPEARANCES: David L. Plotsky, Esq. of Plotsky and Dougherty, PC 505/268-0095 for petitioner & moving party; Kristina L. Gagne, Esq. of Daley & Heft, LLP 858/755-5666 for deft & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM LATE FILING OF CLAIM IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO MEET ALL REQUIREMENTS FOR RELIEF UNDER GOV'T CODE SECTION 946.6(c). Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
